title: Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface Coloring Page
seoTitle: Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface Coloring Page - Free PDF
seoDescription: Color a detailed pelican hunting fish at the ocean surface with waves and sky. Free PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Some species, like the brown Pelican hunting at Ocean Surface, hunt by plunge-diving into the ocean from heights of up to 60 feet.
Designed for Medium difficulty, this specific sheet is perfect for practicing blending pastel shades using dual-brush markers.
Coloring this drawing is a fantastic way to learn about advanced mechanical structure and shapes while developing fine motor coordination.
